title: Reschedule a meeting
subtitle: Find a new time politely.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: Could we move the meeting to Friday?
我们可以把会议改到星期五吗？
Thursday is difficult for me because I have an appointment.
星期四对我来说不方便，因为我有预约。
我们可以改会议时间吗？
Yes, Friday afternoon works for me.
可以，星期五下午我方便。

items.en: Could we move the meeting to Friday?
items.zh: 我们可以把会议改到星期五吗？

items.en: Thursday is difficult for me because I have an appointment.
items.zh: 星期四对我来说不方便，因为我有预约。
我们可以改会议时间吗？

items.en: Yes, Friday afternoon works for me.
items.zh: 可以，星期五下午我方便。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我们可以改会议时间吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, Friday afternoon works for me.
lines.zh: 可以，星期五下午我方便。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Thursday is difficult for me because I have an appointment.
lines.zh: 星期四对我来说不方便，因为我有预约。

items.en: Could we move the meeting to Friday?
items.zh: 我们可以把会议改到星期五吗？

items.en: Thursday is difficult for me because I have an appointment.
items.zh: 星期四对我来说不方便，因为我有预约。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
